bug.description: magic number used without symbolic constant making intent unclear and maintenance error-prone

prompt:
There is a magic number used without symbolic constant making intent unclear and maintenance error-prone downstream of function unpack_dl_tti_pdcch_pdu_rel15_value in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/fapi subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/fapi/src/nr_fapi_p7.c:501.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
